channel.title: X Bookmarks + Favorites
channel.description: Hourly generated X bookmarks and favorites feed.

item.title: @landiantech: 迫于员工持续不断的呼吁，亚马逊现在允许员工使用 Claude Code 和 Codex，在 2025 年 11 月亚马逊宣布禁止使用外部 AI 开发工具，员工只能使用自研的...
item.description:
迫于员工持续不断的呼吁，亚马逊现在允许员工使用 Claude Code 和 Codex，在 2025 年 11 月亚马逊宣布禁止使用外部 AI 开发工具，员工只能使用自研的 #Kiro。 > > 当然现在开放使用也是有前置条件的，亚马逊在 AWS Bedrock 平台为自家开设了账户，所有数据都保存在 AWS，而不是交给 A 社和 OpenAI 处理。 https://x.com/landiantech/status/2053672865158062545/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/landiantech/status/2053672865158062545 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/landiantech/status/2053672865158062545/photo/1

item.title: @RealHanyaHu: https://x.com/i/article/2053609142984843264
item.description:
https://x.com/i/article/2053609142984843264
Tweet: https://x.com/RealHanyaHu/status/2053619515871863211 X article: https://x.com/RealHanyaHu/article/2053619515871863211 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/i/article/2053609142984843264

item.title: @LipuAIX: 告别“翻译腔”！让 AI 翻译真正“说人话”的终极提示词 受够了 AI 生硬别扭的“翻译腔”？明明意思对了，读起来就是不像中文？...
item.description:
告别“翻译腔”！让 AI 翻译真正“说人话”的终极提示词 > 受够了 AI 生硬别扭的“翻译腔”？明明意思对了，读起来就是不像中文？ > 我阅读了了翻译大师思果、余光中的书籍，将其“翻译即重写”理论，并结合提示词工程实践，设计了一个全新的「交互式迭代翻译提示词」。 > 它通过三步工作流（重写 -> 自我诊断 -> https://x.com/LipuAIX/status/1995865018324377911/photo/1 https://twitter.com/LipuAIX/status/1934450296199213381
Tweet: https://x.com/LipuAIX/status/1995865018324377911 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/LipuAIX/status/1995865018324377911/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/LipuAIX/status/1934450296199213381

item.title: @vista8: 今天跟一个擅长算命的朋友吃饭，突然好奇，问他想简单学习了解下的话推荐哪本书。 他说看《命运的求索》就够了，一个复旦大学教授写的，把中国各种算命流派和逻辑都讲了一遍。...
item.description:
今天跟一个擅长算命的朋友吃饭，突然好奇，问他想简单学习了解下的话推荐哪本书。 > > 他说看《命运的求索》就够了，一个复旦大学教授写的，把中国各种算命流派和逻辑都讲了一遍。 > > 微信读书上就有，已收藏，抽空翻翻，增加点杂学知识。 https://x.com/vista8/status/2053464149997634043/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/vista8/status/2053464149997634043 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/vista8/status/2053464149997634043/photo/1

item.title: @jinchenma_ai: 卧槽！刚发现一个能读取微信聊天记录的工具，私域运营神器啊！ wx-cli，让 AI 可以自由读取微信消息。 1....
item.description:
卧槽！刚发现一个能读取微信聊天记录的工具，私域运营神器啊！ > > wx-cli，让 AI 可以自由读取微信消息。 > > 1. 消息随便翻：不用点开微信那个难用的搜索框，直接输入关键词就能搜全库聊天记录，速度快到飞起。 > 2. https://x.com/jinchenma_ai/status/2053039222244962728/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/jinchenma_ai/status/2053039222244962728 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/jinchenma_ai/status/2053039222244962728/photo/1

🌟 Awesome LLM Apps, 85K🌟 > https://github.com/Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps

item.title: @iamzhihui: 最近 Claude Skills 越来越火，大家都在聊怎么用它提升效率。 我自己用 Claude Code 很久了，之前最烦的就是面对一大堆...
item.description:
最近 Claude Skills 越来越火，大家都在聊怎么用它提升效率。 > > 我自己用 Claude Code 很久了，之前最烦的就是面对一大堆 Skills，不知道哪个靠谱、哪个真正能解决问题。 > > 到处试来试去，不是效果一般就是安装麻烦，浪费时间。 > > 所以我把日常高频用、反复验证过的几个 Skills https://twitter.com/780262031899242496/status/2004478327311028335
Tweet: https://x.com/iamzhihui/status/2004854569462100176 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/780262031899242496/status/2004478327311028335 - https://twitter.com/iamzhihui/status/2004478327311028335

item.title: @LongChenNotes: 这篇内容可能是今年看过最让人释然的学习方法论 你是否经历过买了课、定了计划、然后啥也没学会的死循环，这篇文章适合你看看 Zara Zhang...
item.description:
这篇内容可能是今年看过最让人释然的学习方法论 > > 你是否经历过买了课、定了计划、然后啥也没学会的死循环，这篇文章适合你看看 > > Zara Zhang 指出，很多人离开学校多年，脑子里还装着学生模式： > 从基础开始、系统学习、先学后做。但那套方法是为被强制学习设计的，成年人拿来用，几乎必然失败。 https://twitter.com/zarazhangrui/status/2004554163125141699
Tweet: https://x.com/LongChenNotes/status/2005291430416421135 Primary URLs: - https://twitter.com/zarazhangrui/status/2004554163125141699

item.title: @ozanoz: Well-crafted prompts for AI image generation →...
item.description:
Well-crafted prompts for AI image generation → > https://fountn.design/resource/promptlab-ai-prompt-engineering-resources-for-designers/ > > by @JumboClinton_ https://x.com/ozanoz/status/2005295840970314181/video/1

item.title: @dejavucoder: claude code is having it's cursor moment after karpathy sensei's post. never been a...
item.description:
claude code is having it's cursor moment after karpathy sensei's post. never been a better time to try it. > > my latest blog on how to get the most out of claude code 2.0 and other agents in general is up now. grab a chai and have fun reading! > > https://sankalp.bearblog.dev/my-experience-with-claude-code-20-and-how-to-get-better-at-using-coding-agents/ https://x.com/dejavucoder/status/2005285904420843892/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/dejavucoder/status/2005285904420843892 Primary URLs: - https://sankalp.bearblog.dev/my-experience-with-claude-code-20-and-how-to-get-better-at-using-coding-agents/ - https://x.com/dejavucoder/status/2005285904420843892/photo/1

item.title: @manthanguptaa: I spent the last few days prompting Claude to understand how its memory system actually...
item.description:
I spent the last few days prompting Claude to understand how its memory system actually works, and it's completely different than ChatGPT's approach > > Spoiler alert: There is no vector database used > > https://manthanguptaa.in/posts/claude_memory/ https://x.com/manthanguptaa/status/2000067845808648266/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/manthanguptaa/status/2000067845808648266 Primary URLs: - https://manthanguptaa.in/posts/claude_memory/ - https://x.com/manthanguptaa/status/2000067845808648266/photo/1

item.title: @bozhou_ai: 蚂蚁开源了一个对AI非常友好的制作信息图的开源项目， https://github.com/antvis/Infographic...
item.description:
蚂蚁开源了一个对AI非常友好的制作信息图的开源项目， > https://github.com/antvis/Infographic > > 内置了接近两百个的信息图模板，并且里面直接有了Prompt模版和http://skills.md文件。 > > 可以非常快速接入claude code 或者我们的工作流，并且基于svg进行生成保证视觉品质与可编辑性 https://x.com/bozhou_ai/status/2005230789659939072/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/bozhou_ai/status/2005230789659939072 Primary URLs: - https://github.com/antvis/Infographic - http://skills.md - https://x.com/bozhou_ai/status/2005230789659939072/photo/1

item.title: @mazzeimotion: I'm not going to lie: @rive_app 's new Scripting feature is intimidating. Learning it...
item.description:
I'm not going to lie: @rive_app 's new Scripting feature is intimidating. Learning it has been quite the journey, and I'm looking forward to share it with you soon. https://x.com/Leo_Mazzei_/status/2004957130345120080/video/1

item.title: @Hesamation: many people don’t know that Claude Code started as a personal side project that spread...
item.description:
many people don’t know that Claude Code started as a personal side project that spread in the internal Anthropic team like a virus. > > this is a perfect article on how Claude Code was built, its tech stack, and how it’s being developed. highly recommended: > > read here https://x.com/Hesamation/status/2005074037748248894/photo/1 https://twitter.com/bcherny/status/2004887829252317325
Tweet: https://x.com/Hesamation/status/2005074037748248894 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/Hesamation/status/2005074037748248894/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/bcherny/status/2004887829252317325

item.title: @op7418: TRAE 月活破160万！借着数据聊 AI 编程生态 Trae 发布了他们的年度开发者报告。 也可以看作 AI Coding...
item.description:
TRAE 月活破160万！借着数据聊 AI 编程生态 > > Trae 发布了他们的年度开发者报告。 > > 也可以看作 AI Coding 的一次生态调研，仔细看了一下，找到了一些有意思的数据。 > > TRAE 现在总用户数已经 600 万了，月活 160 万，作为一个相对专业的编程工具，已经相当不错，可能国内第一了。 > > 周活跃用户在 TRAE https://x.com/op7418/status/2004446870358339756/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/op7418/status/2004446870358339756 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/op7418/status/2004446870358339756/photo/1

item.title: @enesakar: Context7 new architecture — results: - Tokens ↓ 65% - Latency ↓ 38% - Tool calls ↓ 30%...
item.description:
Context7 new architecture — results: > > - Tokens ↓ 65% > - Latency ↓ 38% > - Tool calls ↓ 30% > - Quality ↑ (slight) > > Try yourself: > npx -y @upstash/context7-mcp@1.0.34-canary.5 > > We’ll ship this to prod with an explainer blog post after the holidays. https://x.com/enesakar/status/2004605689445187721/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/enesakar/status/2004605689445187721 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/enesakar/status/2004605689445187721/photo/1

item.title: @thenickpattison: Opened Pinterest to zone out and the first post was ours. One click turned into a...
item.description:
Opened Pinterest to zone out and the first post was ours. One click turned into a rabbit hole of our own projects… none of which I uploaded. Kind of surreal to stumble into. https://x.com/thenickpattison/status/1993494021977915471/video/1
Tweet: https://x.com/thenickpattison/status/1993494021977915471 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/thenickpattison/status/1993494021977915471/video/1

item.title: @thisguyknowsai: 🚨 BREAKING: Google Research just dropped the textbook killer. Its called "Learn Your...
item.description:
🚨 BREAKING: Google Research just dropped the textbook killer. > > Its called "Learn Your Way" and it uses LearnLM to transform any PDF into 5 personalized learning formats. Students using it scored 78% vs 67% on retention tests. > > The education revolution is here. https://x.com/thisguyknowsai/status/2004491374658543958/video/1
Tweet: https://x.com/thisguyknowsai/status/2004491374658543958 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/thisguyknowsai/status/2004491374658543958/video/1

item.title: @ValerioCapraro: Major preprint just out! We compare how humans and LLMs form judgments across seven...
item.description:
Major preprint just out! > > We compare how humans and LLMs form judgments across seven epistemological stages. > > We highlight seven fault lines, points at which humans and LLMs fundamentally diverge: > > The Grounding fault: Humans anchor judgment in perceptual, embodied, and social https://x.com/ValerioCapraro/status/2003457899805233538/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/ValerioCapraro/status/2003457899805233538 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/ValerioCapraro/status/2003457899805233538/photo/1

item.description:

item.title: @grillitype: GT Alpina in “Radical Utopias: Training for a Complicated Future,” a 2020 series of...
item.description:
GT Alpina in “Radical Utopias: Training for a Complicated Future,” a 2020 series of talks. > > Designed by Philipp Dittmar of Complex Pleasures studio, using GT Alpina’s quirky gaps created by its bold italic forms. https://x.com/grillitype/status/2003465978039140362/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/grillitype/status/2003465978039140362 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/grillitype/status/2003465978039140362/photo/1

item.title: @vercel: We improved our text-to-SQL agent by removing 80% of its tools and adding a sandbox....
item.description:
We improved our text-to-SQL agent by removing 80% of its tools and adding a sandbox. > > 40% fewer tokens, 40% fewer steps, 3.5x faster. > > Read about our initial build, mistakes, and file system agent success. > https://vercel.com/blog/we-removed-80-percent-of-our-agents-tools
Tweet: https://x.com/vercel/status/2003218088435851441 Primary URLs: - https://vercel.com/blog/we-removed-80-percent-of-our-agents-tools

item.title: @ryolu_: @simon_he1995 做工具的人沒想明白 大部分 Agent 概念最後都被搓到 prompt 只是如何觸發的區別
item.description:
@simon_he1995 做工具的人沒想明白 > 大部分 Agent 概念最後都被搓到 prompt > 只是如何觸發的區別
Tweet: https://x.com/ryolu_/status/2003481860555571356

item.title: @yoeight: Released a production-ready EventQL parser in Rust 🦀 EventQL is a SQL-inspired query...
item.description:
Released a production-ready EventQL parser in Rust 🦀 > > EventQL is a SQL-inspired query language designed specifically for event sourcing. Smart design that makes indexing obvious. > > Blog: https://yoeight.github.io/blog/2025/12/21/EventQL_A_SQL_Inspired_Query_Language_Designed_For_Event_Sourcing.html
Tweet: https://x.com/yoeight/status/2002964489952722952 Primary URLs: - https://yoeight.github.io/blog/2025/12/21/EventQL_A_SQL_Inspired_Query_Language_Designed_For_Event_Sourcing.html

item.title: @Zai_org: GLM-4.7 is here! GLM-4.7 surpasses GLM-4.6 with substantial improvements in coding,...
item.description:
GLM-4.7 is here! > > GLM-4.7 surpasses GLM-4.6 with substantial improvements in coding, complex reasoning, and tool usage, setting new open-source SOTA standards. It also boosts performance in chat, creative writing, and role-play scenarios. > > Default Model for Coding Plan: https://x.com/Zai_org/status/2003156119087382683/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/Zai_org/status/2003156119087382683 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/Zai_org/status/2003156119087382683/photo/1

item.title: @ivnardini: This week, Vertex AI introduced Agent Designer in Agent Builder. It's a low-code visual...
item.description:
This week, Vertex AI introduced Agent Designer in Agent Builder. > > It's a low-code visual interface that allows you to orchestrate agents and subagents on a canvas, then export the logic directly to the Agent Development Kit (ADK) for code-level refinement. > > > Visual Design: https://x.com/ivnardini/status/2003133506042651105/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/ivnardini/status/2003133506042651105 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/ivnardini/status/2003133506042651105/photo/1

item.title: @xiaohua_888: 今天找到了一个超级好用的AI提示词工具——PromptFill，开源免费。 这玩意儿的核心思路特别妙：把写提示词变成"填空题"。...
item.description:
今天找到了一个超级好用的AI提示词工具——PromptFill，开源免费。 > > 这玩意儿的核心思路特别妙：把写提示词变成"填空题"。 > > 传统写提示词得从头构思，一个词一个词敲。PromptFill直接给你模板，里边变量都帮你列好了，点点选选就能生成专业级提示词。 > > 比如想画个微缩场景，只需要选一下：
Tweet: https://x.com/xiaohua_888/status/2003111260452524267

item.title: @rseroter: If you're mostly doing gimmicky stuff with AI and nothing that feels genuinely useful,...
item.description:
If you're mostly doing gimmicky stuff with AI and nothing that feels genuinely useful, this list might inspire you to try something new ... https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/ai-tips-2025/

item.title: @koylanai: I’m excited to share a new repo: Agent Skills for Context Engineering Instead of just...
item.description:
I’m excited to share a new repo: Agent Skills for Context Engineering > > Instead of just offering a library of black-box tools, it acts as a "Meta-Agent" knowledge base. It provides a standard set of skills, written in markdown and code, that you can feed to an agent so it https://x.com/koylanai/status/2002797649842331919/photo/1 https://twitter.com/koylanai/status/2002646195684991268
Tweet: https://x.com/koylanai/status/2002797649842331919 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/koylanai/status/2002797649842331919/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/koylanai/status/2002646195684991268

item.title: @TheTuringPost: A must-read → A Survey of Context Engineering for LLMs Covers: - Why LLM performance is...
item.description:
A must-read → A Survey of Context Engineering for LLMs > > Covers: > > - Why LLM performance is shaped at inference time > - What's beyond prompt design > - Core components of Context Engineering: retrieval & generation, processing, memory & compression > - System implementations: RAG, https://x.com/TheTuringPost/status/2002154397132833127/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/TheTuringPost/status/2002154397132833127 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/TheTuringPost/status/2002154397132833127/photo/1

item.title: @addyosmani: My LLM coding workflow going into 2026: https://open.substack.com/pub/addyo/p/my-llm-...
item.description:
My LLM coding workflow going into 2026: https://open.substack.com/pub/addyo/p/my-llm-coding-workflow-going-into. Specs, skills, MCPs, small iterative chunks, and always review what the AI suggests.
Tweet: https://x.com/addyosmani/status/2002438238309658656 Primary URLs: - https://open.substack.com/pub/addyo/p/my-llm-coding-workflow-going-into

item.title: @koylanai: After reading Karpathy's YC talk and year-end review, it's clear that there's a real,...
item.description:
After reading Karpathy's YC talk and year-end review, it's clear that there's a real, defensible layer between foundation models and end users. > > The pattern he calls out is "Cursor for X". It's what Cursor revealed about how LLM apps should be architected. > > Karpathy identifies https://x.com/koylanai/status/2002502507843477611/photo/1 https://twitter.com/jack/status/2002425569884111211
Tweet: https://x.com/koylanai/status/2002502507843477611 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/koylanai/status/2002502507843477611/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/jack/status/2002425569884111211

item.title: @GitHub_Daily: 和国外客户开线上会议或者看海外直播平台时，语言不通很尴尬，想找个能实时翻译语音的工具，收费贵不说，翻译质量还不行。 于是，在 GitHub 上找到 Sokuji...
item.description:
和国外客户开线上会议或者看海外直播平台时，语言不通很尴尬，想找个能实时翻译语音的工具，收费贵不说，翻译质量还不行。 > > 于是，在 GitHub 上找到 Sokuji 这个开源工具，专为解决这种实时语音翻译需求而生。 > > 接入 OpenAI、Google Gemini https://x.com/GitHub_Daily/status/2002239364601094258/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/GitHub_Daily/status/2002239364601094258 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/GitHub_Daily/status/2002239364601094258/photo/1

item.title: @joshwoodward: Imagine it's early 2026, and you're using a Gemini MacOS desktop app. What features...
item.description:
Imagine it's early 2026, and you're using a Gemini MacOS desktop app. What features *must* be there for you to love it? Anything you really want to see in the desktop app specifically?

item.title: @fhwofjow51260: GitHub 上的开源工具 MuJing（幕境），通过电影、美剧和真实文档中的语境来学习和记忆单词。...
item.description:
GitHub 上的开源工具 MuJing（幕境），通过电影、美剧和真实文档中的语境来学习和记忆单词。 > > 配合拼写练习、字幕抄写、听写测试等交互方式，把“看懂、听懂、记住”真正连在一起。支持 win/mac > https://github.com/tangshimin/MuJing
Tweet: https://x.com/fhwofjow51260/status/2002008528324829379 Primary URLs: - https://github.com/tangshimin/MuJing

item.description:

item.title: @samwhoo: This is it. I’ve peaked. There’s nowhere to go from here. @simonw you’re incredibly...
item.description:
This is it. I’ve peaked. There’s nowhere to go from here. > > @simonw you’re incredibly kind, thank you so much. I’m glad you enjoyed it. https://x.com/samwhoo/status/2002092548735799460/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/samwhoo/status/2002092548735799460 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/samwhoo/status/2002092548735799460/photo/1

item.title: @_simonsmith: Update: Data tables in NotebookLM are awesome. I uploaded a bunch of papers on...
item.description:
Update: Data tables in NotebookLM are awesome. I uploaded a bunch of papers on rapamycin and longevity, and prompted it to turn that into a structured output. Done in a few minutes. I think this could be hugely useful for meta-analysis, among other things. https://x.com/_simonsmith/status/2002081044972122228/photo/1 https://twitter.com/_simonsmith/status/2001810559369687477
Tweet: https://x.com/_simonsmith/status/2002081044972122228 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/_simonsmith/status/2002081044972122228/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/_simonsmith/status/2001810559369687477

item.title: @MattNiessner: Want to create an avatar from a single image? FlexAvatar is a transformer model that...
item.description:
Want to create an avatar from a single image? > > FlexAvatar is a transformer model that creates full 360°, high-quality, and expressive 3D head avatar from just a single portrait image in minutes. > > Real-time Demo: FlexAvatar's lightweight architecture allows both animation and https://x.com/MattNiessner/status/2001726306460053547/video/1
Tweet: https://x.com/MattNiessner/status/2001726306460053547 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/MattNiessner/status/2001726306460053547/video/1

item.title: @dbreunig: The evolution of @LiteLLM's model schema illustrates the significant changes in applied...
item.description:
The evolution of @LiteLLM's model schema illustrates the significant changes in applied AI over 2025. > > A good chunk of builders are now hitting single endpoints that can execute code, use a computer, manipulate files, and search the web. https://www.dbreunig.com/2025/12/19/how-model-use-has-changed-in-2025.html
Tweet: https://x.com/dbreunig/status/2002114764642922530 Primary URLs: - https://www.dbreunig.com/2025/12/19/how-model-use-has-changed-in-2025.html

item.title: @karrisaarinen: You’ve maybe heard from me on this topic too many times, but this is the last I’ll...
item.description:
You’ve maybe heard from me on this topic too many times, but this is the last I’ll offer (at least for now). > > My worry isn’t the code or the tools themselves. The question is how we keep thoughtful design alive even as new tools and technologies emerge. > > https://linear.app/now/design-is-more-than-code
Tweet: https://x.com/karrisaarinen/status/2002114744623542381 Primary URLs: - https://linear.app/now/design-is-more-than-code

item.title: @rseroter: CONTEXT-driven development. This is about more than starting greenfield projects with...
item.description:
CONTEXT-driven development. > > This is about more than starting greenfield projects with new specs. Rather it's getting a full picture of your context that drives AI work on new or existing codebases. > > My boss started it, and now Conductor is available: https://developers.googleblog.com/conductor-introducing-context-driven-development-for-gemini-cli/
Tweet: https://x.com/rseroter/status/2001754270803329180 Primary URLs: - https://developers.googleblog.com/conductor-introducing-context-driven-development-for-gemini-cli/

item.title: @amix3k: Cursor feels like a company without product management. Just devs and designers running...
item.description:
Cursor feels like a company without product management. Just devs and designers running seemingly random experiments with little higher-level strategy. > > I use Cursor a lot, and it is becoming a very frustrating experience: > > — The interface is cluttered with tiny icons that get https://twitter.com/ky__zo/status/2001336328085192781

item.title: @mitsuhiko: I don't use Claude's plan mode. I made some potentially uninformed statements today...
item.description:
I don't use Claude's plan mode. I made some potentially uninformed statements today about plan mode, so I learned what it does by looking at the code. This might or might not be useful to you. https://lucumr.pocoo.org/2025/12/17/what-is-plan-mode/
Tweet: https://x.com/mitsuhiko/status/2001393359424819509 Primary URLs: - https://lucumr.pocoo.org/2025/12/17/what-is-plan-mode/

item.title: @gkxspace: 学英语，最顶级的信息差就是 Discord。国外最主流的免费社区，也是国内最被低估的学习神器。 有文字、语音、视频频道，你能随时和全球各地的人交流。...
item.description:
学英语，最顶级的信息差就是 Discord。国外最主流的免费社区，也是国内最被低估的学习神器。 > > 有文字、语音、视频频道，你能随时和全球各地的人交流。 > > 超多免费的学习社区，随时可以找人练口语、找语伴互相教、找雅思备考搭子。 > > 我整理了 7 个质量超高的英语学习社区，按需求分类： https://x.com/gkxspace/status/2001087022300107237/photo/1 https://twitter.com/gkxspace/status/1989141231746666663
Tweet: https://x.com/gkxspace/status/2001087022300107237 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/gkxspace/status/2001087022300107237/photo/1 - https://twitter.com/gkxspace/status/1989141231746666663

item.title: @softwaredoug: Agentic Search will be rewriting search in 2026 Pricing for Cheat at Search to go up...
item.description:
Agentic Search will be rewriting search in 2026 > > Pricing for Cheat at Search to go up next year due to demand. So it's the last time to get 20% off on a $1300 ticket > > https://maven.com/softwaredoug/cheat-at-search?promoCode=ps5
Tweet: https://x.com/softwaredoug/status/2000940409825190240 Primary URLs: - https://maven.com/softwaredoug/cheat-at-search?promoCode=ps5

item.title: @GitHub_Daily: 写 Prompt 最头疼的往往不是构思，而是反复的 “试错”。改个词效果变差，加句话逻辑变乱，把大量时间耗在了手动调试上。 偶然在 GitHub 上看到 Salesforce...
item.description:
写 Prompt 最头疼的往往不是构思，而是反复的 “试错”。改个词效果变差，加句话逻辑变乱，把大量时间耗在了手动调试上。 > > 偶然在 GitHub 上看到 Salesforce AI 研究院开源了 Promptomatix 这个框架，目的就是终结这种低效的手工调优。 https://x.com/GitHub_Daily/status/2001140322026578430/photo/1
Tweet: https://x.com/GitHub_Daily/status/2001140322026578430 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/GitHub_Daily/status/2001140322026578430/photo/1

item.title: @MotionLonelines: check this my cute owl animation created using @rive_app ....

item.title: @jerryjliu0: Building “RAG 2.0” is just making Claude Code running over your filesystem 🤖🗂️ To make...
item.description:
Building “RAG 2.0” is just making Claude Code running over your filesystem 🤖🗂️ > > To make this work well, you need to solve three things > 1️⃣ Virtualize your filesystem to prevent the agent from messing stuff up. AgentFS by @tursodatabase is a nice example of how you can give the https://x.com/jerryjliu0/status/2000677592559706396/video/1 https://twitter.com/llama_index/status/2000612235505467824
Tweet: https://x.com/jerryjliu0/status/2000677592559706396 Primary URLs: - https://x.com/jerryjliu0/status/2000677592559706396/video/1 - https://twitter.com/llama_index/status/2000612235505467824

item.title: @immersivetran: Sonniss 年度福利超劲爆，超过 200GB...
item.description:
Sonniss 年度福利超劲爆，超过 200GB 的音效库，免费下载，2015-2024所有的音效包都免费下载，只要你现在在做短视频或者未来你可能需要做短视频，那么这个绝对不能错过，赶紧囤起来！ > > Sonniss 是一家专业做音频资源和声音设计的公司，每年在 https://x.com/immersivetran/status/2000527067121873146/photo/1

item.title: @huang_chao4969: Just open-sourced AnyTool ✨ - tackling some real pain points in agent tool...
item.description:
Just open-sourced AnyTool ✨ - tackling some real pain points in agent tool orchestration 🛠️ > > Building AI agents is still pretty challenging - even with MCP around, tool orchestration has become one of the biggest headaches. We're seeing issues like overwhelming tool contexts,
